promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Preserve answer-version deltas and UNSPECIFIED boundaries. Do not flatten variant ZIP names or confirmation semantics into active doctrine from this batch.
family_rationale: Three adjacent docs in folder order form one bounded audit/questions plus answers family.
The main value is contradiction-preserving comparison across the two answer surfaces.
Bundling avoids losing the semantic link between the six audited gaps and their answer attempts.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: Possible downstream consequence only; preserve source-local ambiguity markers and answer-version differences; no direct A2-1 or runtime/control promotion from this batch.
intra_family_deltas: Source 2 adds ZIP names not present in source 1, including proposal-side overlay naming.
Source 1 gives stronger FULL+ and FULL++ confirmation semantics than source 2.
Source 2 preserves more quoted thread language and some stronger batch-scale markers.
Source 3 frames the six gaps as non-contradictions, while the answer variants still diverge.
notes: Only the assigned upgrade-docs root was read for this batch.
Folder-order bundling preserved even though semantic interpretation starts from the audit file.
The next large source in folder order is the megaboot suite doc.
